name: Catherine Hayes Lane park
description: Catherine Hayes Lane park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morrisonville, NY. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, adaptive programming, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Cliff Haven Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cliff Haven Park in Plattsburgh, NY! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Picketts Corner Park, Saranac
description: Come play pickleball at Picketts Corner Park, Saranac in Saranac, NY! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Plattsburgh United Methodist Church
description: Plattsburgh United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Plattsburgh, NY. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Rouses Point Recreation Center
description: Rouses Point Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rouses Point, NY. The court surface is asphalt. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Schuyler Falls Town Hall
description: Schuyler Falls Town Hall is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morrisonville, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Senior Citizens Council
description: Senior Citizens Council is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plattsburgh, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
hours: Monday through Friday 8:00 am to 3:30 pm The Senior Center will be closed when the Plattsburgh City School District closes for inclement weather! name: West Plattsburgh Park
description: West Plattsburgh Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morrisonville, NY. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, adaptive programming, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free.

name: YMCA at the Oval
description: YMCA at the Oval is a place to play pickleball in Plattsburgh, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
open_play_schedule: Open Play is active in the mornings, afternoons come as a group
